calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Aug-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Seth Skootsky, via Zoom, for James Lipset; Steve Margolin, via Zoom, for related Beneficiary.

Mr. Skootsky and Mr. Margolin confirm that drafting attorney Mr. Guggenheim advised that he did not recall working with the decedent. The court mentions having reviewed the recently filed third supplement and offers its understanding. Mr. Skootsky offers additional advocacy for the court's approval of this petition, including, but not limited to, mentioning IRS code 2041. The court confirms with Mr. Skootsky that he is not aware of any objections to this petition.

The court takes this matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Court Reporter: Dina Thompson. CSR#: 9693. T: 707.592.7733. E: csr.dinathompson@gmail.com.

Petition To Modify Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Continued To Aug-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Seth Skootsky, via Zoom, for James Lipset, Petitioner, Steve Margolin, via Zoom, attorney for related Beneficiary.

The court offers its position regarding the settlor's intent, points to probate code 15409, and states that it would be helpful if it had testimony from the drafting attorney to consider. Mr. Skootsky advises that the drafting attorney is Richard Guggenheim and advises that he now understands what supplemental information the court is seeking and advises that he can provide that information to the court via verified declarations and requests a continuance to do so. The court summarizes what information it will be expecting prior to the next calling of this matter.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Aug-24-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file his papers by Aug-12-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Reporter: Robin Rivielo/CSR: 11694/T: 831.345.0313/E: robinriv4@aol.com.
